content: She felt better after telling him everything.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Si sentiva meglio dopo avergli detto tutto
rus:Она почувствовала себя лучше после того, как всё ему рассказала
por:Ela se sentiu melhor depois de contar tudo a ele
